name: Guangxi Yuegui Guangye Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangxi Yuegui Guangye Holdings Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells sugar and paper products in China and internationally. The company offers white sugar, mechanism and cultural paper, bagasse bleaching pulp, compound fertilizer, light calcium carbonate, edible alcohol, and caustic soda. It provides its products under the Osmanthus and Pure Point brands. The company was formerly known as Guangxi Guitang (Group) Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Guangxi Yuegui Guangye Holdings Co., Ltd. in July 2018. The company was founded in 1956 and is based in Guigang, China.
